_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: MythicPvP Folia
author: admin@mythicpvp.net
description: Runs a MythicPvP Folia shard from the custom mythicpvp/pterodactyl-folia image.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -e
cd /mnt/server
echo "eula=true" > eula.txt
echo "MythicPvP Folia image provides Folia, MythicPvP jars, and defaults at container start."

variables.name: Server Type
variables.description: Logical MythicPvP server type, such as hub or skyblock.

variables.name: Shard ID
variables.description: Unique shard identifier reported to MythicPvP services.

variables.name: SpacetimeDB URI
variables.description: HTTP URL for the SpacetimeDB service.

variables.name: SpacetimeDB Module
variables.description: SpacetimeDB module name used by MythicPvP.

variables.name: Online Mode
variables.description: Whether Folia should run in online mode. Keep false for proxy/direct testing unless you intentionally need Mojang auth on this shard.

variables.name: Voice Host
variables.description: Public hostname or IP advertised by Simple Voice Chat.

variables.name: Voice Port
variables.description: UDP voice port inside the server container.

variables.name: Java Options
variables.description: Java flags passed to Folia. Memory is primarily controlled by the Pterodactyl allocation and MaxRAMPercentage.

variables.name: Velocity Forwarding Secret
variables.description: Shared secret used by Velocity-modern forwarding. MUST match the proxy's forwarding.secret. The entrypoint writes this into proxies.velocity.secret in paper-global.yml on every boot. Leave empty to keep the value already in paper-global.yml.

variables.name: Proxy Domain
variables.description: Domain suffix the backend prepends with <shard>. when transferring players via the Server Transfer packet. Must match one of the proxy's MYTHIC_CONFIG_DOMAIN_SUFFIX entries. Example: 'play.mythicpvp.net' means cross-shard transfers send the client to 'skyblock-1.play.mythicpvp.net'.

variables.name: Proxy Port
variables.description: Public port the proxy listens on. Used together with MYTHIC_PROXY_DOMAIN for cross-shard transfers.
